hero.headline:
Custom Pools Built Right the
First Time
hero.subheadline: From free 3D designs to final walkthrough, Scott's Pools & Spas handles every detail of your pool construction, remodel, or equipment upgrade. Jacksonville's trusted builder for luxury outdoor living that lasts.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Construction &<br class="hidden md:block"> Renovation in Jacksonville
services.subtitle: Whether you are dreaming of a brand-new custom pool or breathing new life into an aging one, we deliver craftsmanship that stands the test of Florida's sun and salt air.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Ground-up pool builds tailored to your backyard, lifestyle, and budget. Every project includes free 3D renderings so you see exactly what you are getting before a single shovel hits the ground.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling & Renovation
cards.description: Replastering, retiling, coping replacement, and deck resurfacing that transforms worn-out pools into backyard showpieces. We modernize outdated designs while preserving what you love.

cards.title: Equipment Replacement & Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, automation systems, LED lighting, and salt chlorine generators installed by licensed professionals. We spec the right equipment for your pool size and usage patterns.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Additions
cards.description: Seamlessly integrate a spa into your existing pool or build a standalone retreat. From spillover designs to raised spas with water features, we create your perfect relaxation space.

cards.title: Water Features & Hardscape
cards.description: Grottos, waterfalls, bubblers, deck jets, and custom hardscaping that elevate your pool from functional to extraordinary. Each feature is engineered to complement your home architecture.

cards.title: Signature Build Packages
cards.description: Pre-designed pool packages with financing options starting at $600/month. Get a luxury pool without the luxury timeline — streamlined construction with no shortcuts on quality.

how_it_works.headline: Your Pool in Three Simple Steps

steps.title: Free Design Consultation
steps.description: We visit your property, discuss your vision, and create a detailed 3D rendering of your dream pool at no cost. You will see exactly what your finished backyard will look like before committing.

steps.title: Expert Construction
steps.description: Our licensed crew follows an 8-step build process with progress-based payments — you only pay as milestones are completed. Regular updates and photos keep you informed every step of the way.

steps.title: Pool School & Handoff
steps.description: At completion, we walk you through your entire system during our Pool School orientation. You will know exactly how to operate and maintain your new pool before we leave.

about.label: Why Jacksonville Trusts Scott's Pools
about.headline: Built Right Means Built to Last
about.description: Scott's Pools & Spas is a licensed Florida pool contractor dedicated to straightforward communication and detail-oriented craftsmanship. We do not cut corners and we do not surprise you with hidden costs. Every project follows our proven 8-step process — from initial consultation through final closeout — ensuring code compliance, structural integrity, and a finish that looks stunning for decades in Northeast Florida's demanding climate.

features.title: Free 3D Designs Included
features.description: Every proposal includes photorealistic 3D renderings of your finished pool and backyard. No guessing, no surprises — you approve the exact design before construction begins.

features.title: Progress-Based Payments
features.description: You never pay upfront or in advance of work completed. Our milestone payment structure means your money follows the progress, protecting your investment at every stage.

features.title: Code-Compliant Construction
features.description: Every build meets or exceeds Florida building codes and industry standards. Proper permitting, inspections, and documentation protect you and your property value long-term.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: From Signature Build packages starting at $600/month to fully custom designs, we provide detailed written proposals so you know exactly what you are investing.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every pool we build is backed by our commitment to getting it right the first time. If any aspect of our workmanship does not meet the standards outlined in your contract, we will return and correct it at no additional cost. We stake our license and our reputation on every project because referrals from satisfied homeowners are how we have built this business.

faqs.question: How long does a new pool build typically take?
faqs.answer: Most custom pool builds take 8 to 12 weeks depending on design complexity, permitting timelines, and weather. Our 8-step process keeps everything on track, and we provide regular progress updates so you always know where things stand.

faqs.question: Do I really get a free 3D design before committing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We create detailed 3D renderings of your proposed pool and backyard at no cost and no obligation. You will see exactly what the finished project looks like from multiple angles before you decide to move forward.

faqs.question: What is the payment structure for a new pool?
faqs.answer: We use a progress-based payment schedule tied to construction milestones. You never pay ahead of completed work. The exact breakdown is outlined clearly in your contract before any work begins.

faqs.question: Do you handle all the permits and inspections?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manage the entire permitting process with the City of Jacksonville and schedule all required inspections. As a licensed Florida contractor, we ensure every build is fully code-compliant from start to finish.

faqs.question: Can you remodel my existing pool instead of building new?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Pool remodeling is one of our core services. Whether you need replastering, new tile, updated coping, a deck resurface, or a complete design overhaul, we bring aging pools back to life with modern materials and techniques.

testimonials.name: Mike T.
testimonials.text: Scott came out within 30 minutes of our first call and spent over an hour understanding what we wanted. The 3D design was incredible and the finished pool looks even better. Honest, punctual, and detail-obsessed — exactly what you want in a pool builder.

testimonials.name: Rachel & David K.
testimonials.context: Full pool remodel with spa addition
testimonials.text: Our 20-year-old pool looked brand new after Scott's team finished. They handled everything from permits to final inspection and kept us informed with photos every step. The spa addition was the cherry on top. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: James P.
testimonials.text: Other companies quoted us double for the same equipment work. Scott was transparent with pricing, showed us pictures of every stage, and explained everything in terms we could understand. Our energy bill dropped significantly with the new variable speed pump.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free 3D design consultation with no obligation. See your future backyard in stunning detail before committing a single dollar. Jacksonville's most-reviewed pool builder is ready when you are.

footer.description: Licensed Florida pool contractor specializing in custom construction, remodels, and equipment upgrades. Proudly serving Jacksonville and Northeast Florida.
